sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_order_data_from_erp_d365`( orderNumber ,contractNo , orderExecNumber , orderCreateTime ,customerRequireTime , customerCode ,customerName,projectName,orderComment,orderType, compCode, salesType, customInfo) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].contractNo#,#list[].orderExecNumber#,#list[].orderCreateTime#,#list[].customerRequireTime#, #list[].customerCode#,#list[].customerName#,#list[].projectName#,#list[].orderComment#,#list[].orderType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].salesType#, #list[].customInfo# )

INSERT INTO `pm_order_line_from_erp_d365`(orderNumber ,lineNum ,itemCode ,itemDesc , orderQuantity ,openQuantity ,bundleCode ,warrantyMonth,lineType, compCode, profitCenter, realOrderExecNumber, customInfo) values
( #list[].orderNumber#,#list[].lineNum#,#list[].itemCode#,#list[].itemDesc#, #list[].orderQuantity#,#list[].openQuantity#,#list[].bundleCode#,#list[].warrantyMonth#, #list[].lineType#, #list[].compCode#, #list[].profitCenter#, #list[].realOrderExecNumber#, #list[].customInfo# )
